misc.text: OROCHIMARU DIED!!! #NARUTO Globe Observer (@_GlobeObserver) 🚨🚨 BREAKING: Unconfirmed reports are circulating that Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu has been killed in an Iranian attack.
